# BinderPro
> BinderPro generates personalized home operating manuals — AI-assembled PDFs with emergency procedures, maintenance schedules, system documentation, and region-specific guidance.

## About
BinderPro is a product by the GetLiberated ecosystem. It creates custom home binders tailored to a homeowner's specific property, region, household, and installed systems. The platform uses a rules engine with 87+ content modules and an AI pipeline (local + cloud) to produce 8-section PDFs covering emergency response, maintenance, guest/sitter instructions, and more.

## Pricing
- Standard Binder: $59 — personalized home operating manual with core modules
- In-Depth Binder: $99 — premium manual with AI-enhanced narratives and expanded system documentation

## Key Features
- 87+ content modules covering emergency, seasonal, maintenance, cleaning, systems, and landscaping
- Region-specific guidance derived from ZIP code (hurricane prep, blizzard readiness, tornado plans, etc.)
- Home-type customization (single-family, condo, townhouse, apartment, mobile home)
- Household-aware content (children, pets, elderly, allergies)
- 20+ system-specific modules (pool, solar, smart home, septic, well water, EV charger, etc.)
- Guest & sitter packet with alarm codes, escalation contacts, and pet care instructions
- Fill-in checklist for items the system identified as missing from the profile
- Digital access for reprinting and updating sections at any time

## Coverage
Regions: Northeast, Southeast, Midwest, Southwest, West, Pacific Northwest, Mountain West
Home types: Single-family, Condo, Townhouse, Apartment, Mobile Home
